name: American Truck Simulator
author: ops@refx.example
description: Convoy multiplayer trucking. SteamCMD-installed ATS dedicated server (server_config.sii).

installScript.script:
#!/bin/bash
# ReFx steamcmd shim — the steamcmd:debian/proton install image ships no
# `steamcmd` on PATH. Bootstrap SteamCMD and expose it on PATH so the egg's
# `steamcmd ...` calls resolve (otherwise the game server never downloads).
if ! command -v steamcmd >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
  curl -sSL https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz | tar zxf - -C /mnt/server/steamcmd || { echo "ERROR: failed to fetch steamcmd"; exit 1; }
  chmod +x /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh /mnt/server/steamcmd/linux32/steamcmd 2>/dev/null || true
  printf '#!/bin/sh\nexec /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh "$@"\n' > /usr/local/bin/steamcmd
  chmod +x /usr/local/bin/steamcmd
fi
set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server
steamcmd +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login anonymous +app_update 2239530 validate +quit
# Seed ATS server_config.sii from panel vars. NOTE: a runnable ATS dedicated server
# ALSO requires server_packages.sii + server_packages.dat exported from an ATS game
# client (Valve/SCS design) — those cannot be generated server-side.
ATSCFG=/mnt/server/server_config.sii
if [ ! -f "$ATSCFG" ]; then
  cat > "$ATSCFG" <<EOF
SiiNunit
{
server_config : _nameless.server.config {
 lobby_name: "${SERVER_NAME}"
 password: "${SERVER_PASSWORD}"
 max_players: ${MAX_PLAYERS}
 max_vehicles_total: 100
 connection_virtual_port: 100
 query_virtual_port: 101
 connection_dedicated_port: ${SERVER_PORT}
 query_dedicated_port: 27016
 server_logon_token: ""
 player_damage: true
 traffic: true
 hide_in_company: false
 hide_colliding: true
 force_speed_limiter: false
 mods_optioning: false
 service_no_collision: false
 in_menu_ghost_mode: false
 name_tags: true
 friends_only: false
 show_server: true
}
}
EOF
fi
echo 'American Truck Simulator dedicated server install complete.'

variables.description: Name shown in the convoy server browser.
Maximum convoy player slots (ATS supports up to 8).
Leave blank for an open server.

longDescription: Run a private convoy and haul freight across America with friends on a dedicated ATS server.
